_doc: Layer 2 of the screener's news ingestion (CLAUDE.md-versioned doctrine, not engine code): direct publisher RSS/Atom feeds, polled alongside GDELT every cycle. Items still pass the approved-domains firewall on their LINK domain — adding a feed here never bypasses Gate 0. Every URL below was verified live before being added. Known non-starters, checked and excluded: Reuters (no public RSS since 2020), Business Standard + Moneycontrol (bot-block RSS with 403), EIA (connection refused). The SEC requires a descriptive User-Agent with a contact — set NEWS_RSS_USER_AGENT if the default is ever rejected.
